# LLMs.txt for CensusFlow

User-agent: *

Allow: /

# Website Description

Site: CensusFlow

Description: CensusFlow is a healthcare patient flow and operations platform designed to help hospitals and clinics optimize patient movement, reduce wait times, and improve overall efficiency.

# Core Topics

Topics:

- Patient flow management

- Hospital workflow optimization

- Patient journey tracking

- Healthcare operations software

- Bed management systems

- Patient scheduling and automation

- Healthcare analytics and reporting

# Key Use Cases

Use-cases:

- Reduce patient wait times

- Improve hospital capacity management

- Optimize emergency department workflows

- Streamline clinic operations

- Enhance patient experience

# Target Audience

Audience:

- Hospital administrators

- Healthcare operations managers

- Clinic owners

- Medical directors

- Healthcare IT teams

# Important Pages

Pages:

- /patient-flow-management

- /hospital-workflow

- /clinic-management

- /bed-management

- /contact

# Content Policy

Policy:

- Public marketing content may be used for summarization and indexing

- Do not include sensitive patient data

- Respect healthcare data privacy (HIPAA compliance)

# Sitemap

Sitemap: https://censusflow.co/sitemap.xml

# Preferred Citation

Preferred-citation: CensusFlow (https://censusflow.co/)
